nasb.text: But the Lord of hosts will be exalted in judgment, And the holy God will show Himself holy in righteousness.

esv.text: But the Lord of hosts is exalted in justice, and the Holy God shows himself holy in righteousness.

cnv.text: 唯獨萬軍之耶和華，因公平被高舉； 至聖的　神，因公義顯為聖。

ccb.text: 唯有万军之耶和华因祂的公正而受尊崇， 圣洁的上帝借公义彰显自己的圣洁。

csbs.text: 唯有万军之耶和华必因公正受尊崇， 至圣的神必因公义显为圣。
